name: AI agents create virtual playgrounds to help robots get crucial training data
summary: “SceneSmith” system uses collaborative AI agents to create realistic 3D environments of places like kitchens, hotels, and living rooms, where robots can simulate everyday chores.
description: “SceneSmith” system uses collaborative AI agents to create realistic 3D environments of places like kitchens, hotels, and living rooms, where robots can simulate everyday chores.
author: Alex Shipps | MIT CSAIL
